---
title: "Groundfish Distribution Centroids"
author: "Markus Min"
date: "`r Sys.Date()`"
output:
  html_document
---

This plot shows the latitudinal centroid of the distribution of each of the species:

![Latitudinal centroid of each species. Note that the longitudinal centroid is not shown, as for many species this is on land.](../figures/trawl_survey/centroids_map.png){width=100%}


## CPUE Maps {.tabset .tabset-pills}


### Black Rockfish

![CPUE map for Black Rockfish.](../figures/trawl_survey/black_rf_allyears_cpue_map.png){width=100%}

### Canary Rockfish

![CPUE map for Canary Rockfish.](../figures/trawl_survey/canary_rf_allyears_cpue_map.png){width=100%}

### Copper Rockfish 

![CPUE map for Copper Rockfish.](../figures/trawl_survey/copper_rf_allyears_cpue_map.png){width=100%}

### Dover Sole 

![CPUE map for Dover Sole.](../figures/trawl_survey/dover_sole_allyears_cpue_map.png){width=100%}

### Lingcod 

![CPUE map for Lingcod.](../figures/trawl_survey/lingcod_allyears_cpue_map.png){width=100%}

### Petrale Sole 

![CPUE map for Petrale Sole.](../figures/trawl_survey/petrale_sole_allyears_cpue_map.png){width=100%}

### Quillback Rockfish 

![CPUE map for Quillback Rockfish.](../figures/trawl_survey/quillback_rf_allyears_cpue_map.png){width=100%}

### Rex Sole 

![CPUE map for Rex Sole.](../figures/trawl_survey/rex_sole_allyears_cpue_map.png){width=100%}

### Rougheye/Blackspotted Rockfish 

![CPUE map for Rougheye/Blackspotted Rockfish.](../figures/trawl_survey/rougheye_rf_allyears_cpue_map.png){width=100%}

### Sablefish

![CPUE map for Sablefish.](../figures/trawl_survey/sablefish_allyears_cpue_map.png){width=100%}

### Vermilion & Sunset Rockfish

![CPUE map for Vermilion & Sunset  Rockfish.](../figures/trawl_survey/vermilion_rf_allyears_cpue_map.png){width=100%}

### Yellowtail Rockfish 

![CPUE map for Yellowtail Rockfish.](../figures/trawl_survey/yellowtail_rf_allyears_cpue_map.png){width=100%}
